productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men Ortiz Brown Semi Formal Shoe
description: buckaroo is known for its exquisite craft in leather. These formal shoes are the most and fashionable way to walk into your office. This Buckaroo men Ortiz Brown Casual shoe is a tactile pair that is a fashion forward yet comfortable foot-style choice. Pair it with crisp formal trousers, full-sleeved shirts and tonal belts. Upper Genuine leather upper, for durability and style Pointed toe design for comfort Leather wrap-around overlay along the heel and midfoot for better support Hidden elastic gores on either side for a customised Fit Slip-on design for easy removal and wearing of shoes Lightly padded collar and tongue for in-step comfort and a snug fit Well-cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Brand badge on the midfoot Leather lining to absorb moisture and keep feet dry Midsole EVA midsole with shock absorbers Outsole Durable rubber outsole with leaf pattern grooves on the forefoot and midfoot for enhanced grip and traction Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style Shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
